name: webstackbuilders-corporate-email-footer
description: HTML email footer for Webstack Builders corporate email
author: kevin@webstackbuilders.com

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run test:length
scripts.build:core: npm run clean && npm run prebuild && npm run compile && npm run minify
scripts.dev: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory dist
scripts.lint: npm run clean && npx mkdirp .cache && npm run compile && npx gulp lint
